name: Girl with a Pearl Earring
description: A meditation in Carrara white and warm amber, cut into 14,200 tesserae across a 36 × 24 in panel. Vermeer's luminous 1665 masterwork, faithfully rendered in marble and stone by our artisans in Jaipur. Each tessera is honed; the pearl itself is set in polished Murano glass. Framed in reclaimed walnut.
shortDescription: After Vermeer, 1665 — 14,200 tesserae in Carrara marble and Murano glass.
metaTitle: Girl with a Pearl Earring Mosaic — Mosaic Canvas
metaDescription: Vermeer's 1665 masterwork rendered in 14,200 hand-cut Carrara marble tesserae. Handcrafted in Jaipur, shipped worldwide.

name: The Lion, Majesty
description: Tiger-eye and travertine compose this commanding portrait — 12,100 tesserae, each cut to follow the direction of each strand of the mane. The eyes are polished obsidian. A symbol of strength and sovereignty, rendered in stone that will outlast any canvas. Framed in brushed bronze.
shortDescription: Tiger-eye & travertine — 12,100 tesserae. A commanding portrait in natural stone.
metaTitle: The Lion, Majesty Mosaic — Mosaic Canvas
metaDescription: A commanding lion portrait in tiger-eye and travertine — 12,100 hand-cut tesserae, handcrafted in Jaipur.

name: The Lotus, Serene
description: A meditation in Carrara white and deep Jaipur teal, cut into 9,400 tesserae across a 36 × 24 in panel. Each petal is polished; each leaf, honed. The stem rises from a bed of dark Nero Marquina marble, suggesting still water at dawn. Framed in reclaimed teak.
shortDescription: Carrara marble & deep Jaipur teal — 9,400 tesserae. A meditation in still stone.
metaTitle: The Lotus, Serene Mosaic — Mosaic Canvas
metaDescription: 9,400 hand-cut tesserae in Carrara marble and deep Jaipur teal. A serene lotus composition, handcrafted in Jaipur.

name: Peacock, Unfurled
description: Malachite, lapis lazuli, and 22k gold leaf — 15,800 tesserae in the most material-rich composition in our atelier. The tail feathers fan across 48 inches of panel, each eye rendered in concentric rings of emerald and sapphire stone. No two gold-leaf tesserae reflect the same light. Framed in blackened steel.
shortDescription: Malachite, lapis & 22k gold leaf — 15,800 tesserae. The most jewel-toned work we make.
metaDescription: 15,800 tesserae in malachite, lapis lazuli and 22k gold leaf. The most jewel-toned composition in our atelier.

name: Roses in Bloom
description: Nine cultivars, rendered across 8,200 tesserae of rose quartz, Murano glass, and natural red and pink stone. The petals unfurl in the warm light of mid-afternoon — a composition that never wilts. Each leaf is cut from Verde Guatemala marble. Framed in walnut.
shortDescription: Nine rose cultivars in rose quartz & Murano glass — 8,200 tesserae.
metaTitle: Roses in Bloom Mosaic — Mosaic Canvas
metaDescription: Nine rose cultivars in 8,200 hand-cut tesserae of rose quartz and Murano glass. Handcrafted in Jaipur, India.

name: Sunflowers
description: After Van Gogh, 1888. Eleven sunflowers in a Delft-blue vase — 11,600 tesserae in warm amber, ochre, and Siena stone. The brushwork of the original is captured in the varied angle of each cut. A composition that carries both the weight of stone and the warmth of summer. Framed in aged oak.
shortDescription: After Van Gogh, 1888 — 11,600 tesserae in amber and Siena stone.
metaDescription: Van Gogh's 1888 Sunflowers in 11,600 hand-cut tesserae of amber and Siena stone. Handcrafted in Jaipur, India.

name: Wildflower Meadow
description: Seven species — cornflower, poppy, chamomile, lavender, clover, foxglove, and wild rose — across 7,400 tesserae of mixed stone. A meadow caught in late-afternoon gold. The composition is deliberately loose, wild in its arrangement, ordered only by season and colour. Framed in natural linen.
shortDescription: Seven wildflower species in mixed stone — 7,400 tesserae. A meadow in late-afternoon gold.
metaDescription: Seven wildflower species in 7,400 hand-cut tesserae of mixed stone. A meadow caught in late-afternoon gold.
